en.title: FUD FAQ | A Weekly Community Thread | Week 68

blocks.value: FUD FAQ | A Weekly Community Thread | Week 68
Top Question of the Week
What good is access to a factory if you don’t know what to build?
Shifting from free to play, which really means “free to be addicted”, to free to build, is still cost prohibitive today, even for small batch at home creative production.
If you want to scale up in the old pre-web3 world to meet soaring demand in a supply chain and inflation crunched economy, good luck.

But, if you want to make use of the streamlined, voluntary and resourceful enhancements to coordination, NFTs, web3 and CC0 have already made real, it’s still going to take a good amount of skill, hunger, creativity and dedication. The good news is this that how we afford to cooperate in production facilities, hyper local, IRL and virtual in the genuinely open metaverse being built in real time all around us, has been forever transformed by all of the many uses of tokenisation.
Curious minds might start thinking more about what on-chain rechargable virtual-companion-like space memberships will look like.
Most Common Repeat Question
Does anyone believe BAYC claiming to be open is enough to hide how much their take on the metaverse looks a whole like just another small digital cage?

When you think about it, I thought that the old style of Zoos went by the way side a long time ago. Denizens of the open metaverse deserve to be free and we will continue to build what it takes to make it so.

If all it took to make the metaverse was high res virtualisation and a certain number of concurrent users the word would be meaningless. Thankfully, we don’t have to sit around eager for apeish boredom in captivity.
Top Controversies
C’mon, really?! Do you really expect us to believe that you believe that? Calling for increased centralisation in web3 is just too silly to even consider a troll.
Whatever the strategic investments you are making might be that make misdirecting on centralisation seem like a good way to support them, we recommend going back to the drawing board on this one.
Silly Fails and Trolling
Not sure which advisors are really leading Elon astray here but it seems beyond doubt at this point that his own judgement isn’t quite at 4D chess level.
View all FUD FAQ here.
If you would like a question answered or contribute content to next weeks article please reach out through our DIGITALAX Discord server in #FUD-FAQ channel!

ar.title: FUD FAQ | ثريد مجتمعي اسبوعي | اسبوع 68

blocks.value: FUD FAQ | ثريد مجتمعي اسبوعي | اسبوع 68
Top سؤال من ال اسبوع
What good is access الى a factory if you don’t know what الى build?
Shifting من free الى play, which really means “free الى be addicted”, الى free الى build, is still cost prohibitive today, even لـ small batch at home ابداعي production.
If you want الى scale up في ال old pre-web3 world الى meet soaring demand في a supply chain و inflation crunched economy, good luck.

But, if you want الى make use من ال streamlined, voluntary و resourceful enhancements الى coordination, NFTs, web3 و CC0 have already made real, it’s still going الى take a good amount من skill, hunger, creativity و dedication. ال good news is this that ازاي we afford الى cooperate في production facilities, hyper local, IRL و virtual في ال genuinely open metaverse being built في real time all around us, has been forever transformed by all من ال many uses من tokenisation.
Curious minds might start thinking more about what على-chain rechargable virtual-companion-like space memberships will look like.
Most Common Repeat سؤال
Does anyone believe BAYC claiming الى be open is enough الى hide ازاي much their take على ال metaverse looks a whole like just another small ديجيتال cage?

When you think about it, I thought that ال old style من Zoos went by ال way side a long time ago. Denizens من ال open metaverse deserve الى be free و we will continue الى build what it takes الى make it so.

If all it took الى make ال metaverse was high res virtualisation و a certain number من concurrent users ال word would be meaningless. Thankfully, we don’t have الى sit around eager لـ apeish boredom في captivity.
أهم الجدل في المجال
C’mon, really?! Do you really expect us الى believe that you believe that? Calling لـ increased centralisation في web3 is just too silly الى even consider a troll.
Whatever ال strategic investments you are making might be that make misdirecting على centralisation seem like a good way الى support them, we recommend going back الى ال drawing board على this one.
Silly Fails و Trolling
مش واضح مين من المستشارين واخد إيلون في اتجاه غلط، بس باين جدًا دلوقتي إن حكمه الشخصي مش على مستوى شطرنج 4D.
